items.question: Is it really free?
items.answer: Yes, the quiz and your score are 100% free. The complete PDF report with in-depth analysis and action plan is paid (from €3.99).

items.question: Is my data confidential?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your answers are anonymized and never shared. We comply with GDPR and your data is stored in Europe.

items.question: Does my partner need to take the test too?
items.answer: No, you can take the test alone. The quiz evaluates your perception of the relationship. For an even more complete analysis, you can each take it separately and compare.

items.question: What's included in the full report?
items.answer: The PDF report (15 pages) includes: detailed analysis of 7 dimensions, relationship strengths, risk areas, comparison with other couples, and a personalized AI-generated action plan.

items.question: Is there a guarantee?
items.answer: Yes, full refund within 7 days, no questions asked.

footer.tagline: Understand your relationship. Change what matters.

hero.sub: An AI agent that truly knows you. Free quiz, personalized report, continuous dialogue platform.

differentiator.title: Not just another chatbot.
differentiator.sub: A space that knows you and grows with you.

items.title: Persistent memory
items.desc: Your agent remembers your conversations, quiz results, and checkups. Every session picks up where you left off.

items.title: Personalized context
items.desc: Your relationship profile, communication style, identified challenges — all injected for truly tailored advice.

items.title: Monthly checkup
items.desc: A quick monthly review to track your relationship's evolution and adjust advice over time.

steps.title: Take the free quiz
steps.desc: 20 questions, 5 minutes. We analyze 7 dimensions of your relationship.

steps.title: Receive your report
steps.desc: A personalized PDF report with your strengths, risk areas, and action plan.

steps.title: Access your space
steps.desc: Continuous dialogue with your AI agent. It knows your profile and grows with you.

items.q: Is the platform different from the quiz?
items.a: Yes. The quiz + report is a one-shot diagnosis. The platform is a continuous dialogue space with an AI agent that knows you and evolves with your relationship.
Absolutely. Your data is encrypted, stored in Europe, and never shared or sold. You can delete it at any time.

items.q: Do I need to take the quiz before accessing the platform?
items.a: The quiz is recommended — it gives your agent initial context. But you can access the platform without the quiz via onboarding.
Yes. The Premium report includes 1 free month of platform access. You can also try 7 days free with no commitment.

items.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.a: One click from your settings. No conditions, no penalties. You keep access until the end of the paid period.
